title: ジャパンダートダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Japan Dirt Derby is here, and we
rush to Oi Racecourse straight from summer
camp.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wow... It's happening!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, a little! My heart is pounding, but not in a
bad way.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's more like adrenaline... Like I'm ready to show
everyone what I'm made of!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm back on track to becoming the top
Umadol on dirt!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's get going and—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wait, huh? That racer over there looks a little...

text_block_list.name: Brunette Umamusume
text_block_list.text: What if I'm no good on dirt either...

text_block_list.name: Brunette Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
No, I'll be fine... I can win this. I'm done with
losing—I'll never lose like that again. I'm a winner!
I can win!

text_block_list.name: Brunette Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I will win!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. Isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If my memory serves correctly, that racer
challenged herself to a turf G1, just like Smart
Falcon. Expectations were high, considering she
was third favorite to win, but...
choice_data_list: She finished last in her last race.
She finished last in her last race.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh... I see...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The two of us are both starting over. But she
seems super on edge...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I really am back in the world of dirt racing, huh.
'Cause look—it's not just her...

text_block_list.name: Racing Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: All right... I'm gonna make this one count!

text_block_list.name: Racing Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna sweep everyone! No one's better than
me on sand!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's got this gleam in their eyes. Something
slightly different than the dreamy glow everyone
had at the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's not that they take racing more seriously, but
there's an edge to it... like they're right on the
edge of a cliff.
choice_data_list: That's a pretty intense way to put it...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, I don't mean it in a bad way! They've just
got this aura around them!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not putting down dirt races! But... I mean...
jumping off a cliff takes real guts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Strange metaphor aside, I can see what she's
getting at. In a country where turf gets all the
attention, many runners turn to dirt only as a last
resort.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And if they fail to perform on dirt... Well, it's
understandable that some might feel like they've
reached the end of the road.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But I can't afford to lose either! I'm not going to
let those feelings get the best of me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hnnng... There!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Now my aura's extra super sparkly! And I'm gonna
swallow everyone up in it! ☆
